_note:
Textarea content is a text/mustache sequence, not markup: the compiler reads it with read_sequence up to /<\/textarea(\s[^>]*)?>/iy, so embedded tags like
are literal TEXT (a textarea shows its content verbatim) and only {...} interpolates. The template parser used to parse textarea children as regular markup, so an unbalanced tag in the content fired phantom mismatched-closing-tag errors and desynced the element tree. Interpolations still type-check: the deliberately wrong shout(42) fires TS2345 at the argument, byte-identical to upstream svelte-check --tsgo, proving the sequence's expressions flow into the overlay with correct positions.
